summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Ghar Ka Zaiqa. 17/17 pytest backend tests passed and all critical frontend flows (cart, booking, admin login, admin dashboard, status update, logout, auth-redirect) verified end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: order_stats() loads up to 5000 orders into memory for stats. As order volume grows, switch to MongoDB aggregation ($group, $match, $sum) to avoid in-process counting.

server.py: get_current_user() reads ObjectId(payload['sub']) without try/except. A maliciously crafted (but signature-valid) token with non-ObjectId 'sub' would raise InvalidId and bubble up as a 500 instead of 401. Wrap in try/except and return 401.

server.py: CORS uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True. Browsers reject this combination for cookie-bearing requests. Set CORS_ORIGINS to explicit production origin(s) when cookie auth is used (Bearer header works fine today).

server.py: startup() reseeds password whenever ADMIN_PASSWORD env differs from stored hash — fine for dev, but document/guard for production so an env change does not silently overwrite admin credentials.
Home.jsx (335 lines) and AdminDashboard.jsx are close to the 700-line guideline but still readable; future refactor could split Home into Hero/Menu/Booking sub-components.
Frontend api.js / AuthContext: token persists in localStorage only — consider also handling 401 globally to auto-logout on expired token (currently a 401 in admin would just fail silently).
AdminDashboard polls every 20s via setInterval; harmless but consider pausing when tab is hidden to reduce backend load.
seed_data_creation: Test orders were created with TEST_ prefix during backend & frontend tests and cleaned up afterwards. DB is clean of TEST_ orders at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers: auth login (success/fail), /auth/me, public POST /orders (cart + booking), 401 on protected endpoints without token, list with status filter, stats schema, full status transition flow (preparing → out_for_delivery → delivered → cancelled), invalid status (400) and unknown id (404), revenue excludes cancelled orders, delete + idempotent 404. All TEST_-prefixed data is cleaned up at the end. Frontend Playwright covers: hero+sections load, add-to-cart, qty inc/dec, checkout validation (no premature error, error on empty submit, message text), full checkout submit creating order + opening wa.me URL, booking-form submit + WhatsApp open, /admin auth-redirect, login wrong/right password, stats cards, status dropdown update, logout clearing gkz_token. WhatsApp window.open behavior is expected (verify via window.__opened intercept).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Implementation matches spec end-to-end.
